creator: hunreal@gmail.com
text:
# netstat -rnF 1
Routing tables (fib: 1)
netstat: sysctl: net.route.0.0.dump.1: Cannot allocate memory

# uname -a
FreeBSD us.hshh.org 10.1-RC1 FreeBSD 10.1-RC1 #0 r272565: Sun Oct  5 14:53:02 UTC 2014     root@us.hshh.org:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/hshh  amd64


It works while using `setfib 1 netstat -rn`.
There are also other people got this bug, https://forums.freebsd.org/viewtopic.php?f=7&t=46972 .
